title: Crash at strcpy_len ()
description: The following test case crashed the monetdb server.
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t1(c1 INTEGER, c2 TEXT, c3 BOOLEAN);
INSERT INTO t1(c1, c2, c3) VALUES (NULL, 'test', 1);
INSERT INTO t1(c1, c2, c3) VALUES (2147483647, NULL, 0);
SELECT * FROM t1 WHERE c1 IS NOT NULL AND (c3 = 1 OR c2 IS NULL);
key_bug_features: Crash during string copy in SQL query execution
